items.headline: The mighty NL Central is the majors' only division with 5 winning teams
items.description:
CHICAGO (AP) — The NL Central has reigning NL Cy Young Award winner Paul Skenes. It has some of the majors' most promising rookies, like Sal Stewart, Konnor Griffin and JJ Wetherholt. It has young stars like Elly De La Cruz and older ones like Christian Yelich.
Maybe this strong start from all five teams isn't that big a surprise after all.

items.headline: Algeria's Luca Zidane doubt for World Cup after jaw fracture
items.description: Algeria goalkeeper Luca Zidane is a doubt for the World Cup after suffering a jaw and chin fracture while playing for his club...

items.headline: 2030 Winter Olympics organizers weigh Paris or Lyon for ice hockey after Nice impasse
items.description:
PARIS (AP) — French organizers of the 2030 Winter Olympics are looking at alternative locations for ice hockey outside of Nice, including in Paris and Lyon, because of a political deadlock involving the Riviera city's new mayor.
Like the Milan Cortina Olympics, the French Alps project has split snow sports in storied mountain resorts and skating in a snow-free city, the Mediterranean resort of Nice.
